description: MCP server configuration. git and memory are built-in (zero dependencies). filesystem and thinking require Node.js/npx but are free.

filesystem.description: Read, search, and list files. Free. Requires Node.js/npx.

git.description: Built-in. Git log, diff, blame, status, branch, show. Zero dependencies.

memory.description: Built-in. Persistent knowledge graph: remember, recall, forget. Zero dependencies.

thinking.description: Sequential Thinking server. Free. Requires Python script from github.com/modelcontextprotocol/servers
